channel.title: Smartcd on ilo
channel.description: Recent content in Smartcd on ilo

item.title: Automate
item.description: In order to simplify the usage of ilo, consider using autoenv-like tooling. These tools all allow you to just enter a directory and will automatically call ilo for you like this: [you@hostname ~]$ cd path/to/your/project [root@container project-dir]# As soon as you enter the directory of your project, these tools will call ilo which in turn will open your build environment for you. autoenv In order to use autoenv, first install it and then place a .
